category_sources: source_facts.description says SPIFFE Helper retrieves and manages SVIDs on behalf of a workload.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is spiffe-helper; official GitHub repository title uses SPIFFE Helper.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/spiffe/spiffe-helper, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions retrieving and managing SVIDs for workloads; source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo identify the official SPIFFE repository.
